briefing_zh:
今日 AI 研究的主旋律是**机器人与具身智能**。**PhysisForcing**（HuggingFace 25 票）专攻视频生成世界模拟器中的物理真实性问题——运动物体变形和机器人-物体交互的时空不一致是两大根本诱因；**Translation as a Bridging Action** 则以翻译层优雅地解决了人类操作技能向双臂机器人迁移的物理鸿沟，使廉价丰富的人类演示数据得以规模化利用。与此同时，**Qwen-Image-2.0-RL** 表明，RLHF 后训练范式已从文本 LLM 成功迁移到图像扩散模型，在对齐、美学和人像保真度三个维度上提供精细奖励信号。

智能体研究层面，alphaxiv 热榜全面充斥 agentic 系统工作：**Qwen-AgentWorld** 将语言世界模型定位为智能体核心认知机制，**OPID** 用在线策略自蒸馏填补 agentic RL 的稀疏奖励空缺，**OpenThoughts-Agent** 攻克跨领域通用智能体的训练数据策划难题。而调查综述 **Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?** 尤为及时——智能体记忆已从简单检索演化为复杂的生命周期管理数据系统，但生产环境的真实就绪度仍存疑问。

开源社区在智能体基础设施上跑得很快：**benchflow-ai/awesome-evals**（571 星）已成为 AI 智能体评测资源的权威索引，**ardhaecosystem/synapse** 将仿海马体时序知识图谱带入自托管记忆方案。Hacker News 上，**OpenKnowledge**（374 分）引发了关于 AI 原生知识管理的激烈讨论，而 **GLM-5.2** 分析文章（365 分/223 评论）的高互动率则揭示社区对开源智能体模型赶超闭源产品的强烈期待。
briefing_en:
Today's AI research landscape is dominated by **robotics and embodied AI**. **PhysisForcing** (25 HF upvotes) tackles physical plausibility in video-based world simulators, identifying two root causes of unrealistic behavior: object deformation and inconsistent spatio-temporal interactions during robot-object contact. **Translation as a Bridging Action** elegantly solves the skill transfer gap with a learned translation layer that maps noisy human demonstration data into clean, robot-executable actions — unlocking cheap, abundant human data for scaling robot learning. Meanwhile, **Qwen-Image-2.0-RL** confirms that RLHF post-training pipelines, now well-established for text LLMs, are being successfully applied to image diffusion models with task-specific composite rewards covering alignment, aesthetics, and portrait fidelity.

On the agent frontier, the alphaxiv feed is saturated with agentic systems research: **Qwen-AgentWorld** positions language-based world models as a core cognitive mechanism for general agents, **OPID** addresses sparse rewards in agentic RL via on-policy self-distillation, and **OpenThoughts-Agent** tackles the unsolved data curation problem for broadly capable cross-domain agents. The survey **Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?** is particularly timely — agent memory has evolved from simple retrieval-augmented generation into lifecycle-managed data systems, but critical production readiness gaps remain.

The open-source community is moving fast on agent infrastructure. **benchflow-ai/awesome-evals** (571 stars) has emerged as the definitive curated resource for AI agent evaluation, while **ardhaecosystem/synapse** brings hippocampus-inspired temporal knowledge graph memory to self-hosted deployments. On Hacker News, **OpenKnowledge** (374 points, 171 comments) sparked intense discussion about AI-native PKM tools, and the **GLM-5.2** analysis piece (365 points, 223 comments) generated the most debate — suggesting strong community conviction that open-source agent models are closing the gap with proprietary ones.
viral_analysis_zh: 今日最可能出圈的是 HN 上的 **OpenKnowledge**（374分/171评论）：它同时击中「替换 Obsidian/Notion」和「从零为 AI 而生」两个传播强话题，生产力社区和 AI 社区会同时转发，传播半径自然翻倍。**GLM-5.2 分析文章**（365分/223评论）同样具有爆款潜力——「开源终于能做 agent 了」的叙事框架激活了 open vs. closed 的身份认同讨论，这类对抗性话题天然催生高互动，让文章被持续引用传播。
viral_analysis_en: Today's most viral item is **OpenKnowledge** (374pts/171 comments on HN) — it combines two irresistible narratives: replace your existing tool (Obsidian/Notion) and built for AI from the ground up, meaning both productivity communities and AI communities share it simultaneously, doubling the reach. The **GLM-5.2 analysis piece** (365pts/223 comments) is equally viral: the framing that open-source finally catches up for agent use cases triggers strong identity-based open vs. closed debates, which drive sustained sharing and amplification well beyond the typical AI research audience.

huggingface_papers.title: PhysisForcing: Physics Reinforced World Simulator for Robotic Manipulation
huggingface_papers.tldr: PhysisForcing addresses physical implausibility in video-based world simulators for robotics by identifying two root causes — object deformation and inconsistent spatio-temporal entity interactions. It injects physics-based constraints as forcing signals into the generation process, producing more reliable, trajectory-consistent robot manipulation simulations that can serve as trustworthy world models for policy learning.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: PhysisForcing 发现视频生成世界模拟器的物理失真主要源于两类问题：运动物体变形和交互实体的时空关联不一致。方法通过向生成过程注入物理约束作为 forcing 信号，让机器人操作仿真轨迹更连贯可信，可直接作为策略学习的可靠世界模型。
huggingface_papers.authors: Peiwen Zhang, Yufan Deng, Shangkun Sun et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Translation as a Bridging Action: Transferring Manipulation Skills from Humans to Robots
huggingface_papers.tldr: This work proposes a learned 'translation layer' that converts cheap, abundant human demonstration videos into robot-executable actions for bimanual robots with parallel grippers. Rather than treating humans as another 6DoF embodiment, the method models the fundamental contact-pattern differences between human fingers and parallel grippers, enabling scalable skill transfer from human action data — bypassing noisy hand-pose estimation.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: 该工作提出一个可学习的「翻译层」，将丰富廉价的人类演示视频转化为平行夹爪双臂机器人可执行的动作。核心是建模人类手指与夹爪的根本性接触模式差异，而非简单地把人视为另一种 6DoF 机器人，从而绕过嘈杂的手势估计，实现了可扩展的技能迁移。
huggingface_papers.authors: Sijin Chen, Kaixuan Jiang, Haixin Shi et al.

huggingface_papers.title: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL Technical Report
huggingface_papers.tldr: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL applies RLHF and on-policy distillation (OPD) to a diffusion-based image generation model, a first for this model family. Task-specific composite reward models built with VLMs evaluate alignment, aesthetics, and portrait fidelity dimensions, showing RLHF's post-training benefits generalizing beyond LLMs to the image generation domain.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Qwen-Image-2.0-RL 将 RLHF 和在线策略蒸馏（OPD）引入图像扩散模型后训练，验证了该范式从文本 LLM 向图像生成的可迁移性。通过微调视觉-语言模型构建的复合奖励模型覆盖对齐、美学和人像保真度三个维度，显著提升了图像质量和指令跟随能力。
huggingface_papers.authors: Yixian Xu, Kaiyuan Gao, Yuxiang Chen et al.

huggingface_papers.title: GBC: Gradient-Based Connections for Optimizing Multi-Agent Systems
huggingface_papers.tldr: GBC introduces gradient-based connection optimization for multi-agent systems, treating inter-agent communication topology as a differentiable parameter. Instead of hand-crafting agent interaction graphs, the system learns which agents should communicate based on gradient signals from overall task performance, enabling more efficient orchestration of complex multi-agent pipelines.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: GBC 将多智能体系统的通信拓扑结构视为可微参数，通过梯度信号优化智能体间连接关系。无需手工设计交互图，系统可从整体任务性能的梯度信号中自动学习哪些智能体应该通信，提升复杂多智能体流水线的编排效率。

huggingface_papers.title: Ko-WideSearch: A Korean Breadth-Search Benchmark for Exhaustive Set Enumeration by Web Agents
huggingface_papers.tldr: Ko-WideSearch introduces a Korean breadth-search benchmark targeting the overlooked dimension of exhaustive set enumeration in web-agent evaluation — where agents must not just find one answer but enumerate all members of a complete set. Built via automated synthesize-and-verify pipeline, it challenges agents to handle breadth tasks (e.g., list all episodes of a TV season) that depth-oriented benchmarks completely miss.
huggingface_papers.tldr_zh: Ko-WideSearch 提出了一个韩语广度搜索基准，专门评测网络智能体被忽视的「穷举集合枚举」能力——不只是找到一个答案，而是完整枚举封闭集合的所有元素。通过自动化合成-验证流水线构建，填补了现有基准过度聚焦深度搜索而忽视宽度搜索的空缺。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Autodata trains an LLM agent to act as a data scientist that autonomously creates high-quality training and evaluation data. The key insight is meta-optimization: the agent learns to build better datasets by being trained on the quality of the downstream data it produces, creating a self-improving loop where the data-generation agent continuously improves the data it creates.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Autodata 训练一个 LLM 智能体扮演数据科学家，自主构建高质量训练与评估数据。核心是元优化：智能体根据其产出数据的下游质量来学习如何创造更好的数据集，形成自我改进循环——数据生成智能体持续优化自己产出的数据质量。

alphaxiv_papers.title: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: OPID addresses the sparse reward problem in agentic RL by combining trajectory-level outcome rewards with dense token-level supervision from on-policy self-distillation. The method identifies which intermediate decisions in an agent's trajectory should be reinforced or suppressed, providing fine-grained learning signal that pure outcome-based RL lacks — improving both sample efficiency and final agent capability.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: OPID 将轨迹级结果奖励与在线策略自蒸馏提供的密集 token 级监督相结合，解决智能体强化学习的稀疏奖励问题。方法可识别轨迹中哪些中间决策应被强化或抑制，提供纯结果驱动 RL 所缺乏的细粒度学习信号，同时提升样本效率和最终智能体能力。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: Qwen-AgentWorld investigates language-based world models as a core cognitive mechanism for general agents, focusing on how world modeling can push beyond current agent capabilities. The work builds language world models that predict environment dynamics from observations and actions, enabling better planning and reasoning without direct environment interaction.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: Qwen-AgentWorld 将基于语言的世界模型定位为通用智能体的核心认知机制，探索世界建模如何突破当前智能体能力边界。该工作构建了从观察和动作预测环境动态的语言世界模型，使智能体无需直接与环境交互即可进行更好的规划和推理。

alphaxiv_papers.title: Are We Ready For An Agent-Native Memory System?
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: This survey examines whether current agent memory systems have achieved production readiness, documenting the evolution from simple RAG retrieval to complex data management systems supporting persistent storage, retrieval, update, consolidation, and dynamic lifecycle governance. The authors identify critical gaps between research prototypes and what real deployed agents actually need for reliable long-term memory.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: 这篇综述检视当前智能体记忆系统的生产就绪度，梳理从简单 RAG 检索到支持持久存储、检索、更新、整合和动态生命周期治理的复杂数据管理系统的演进历程，并指出研究原型与真实部署智能体对可靠长期记忆实际需求之间的关键差距。

alphaxiv_papers.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
alphaxiv_papers.tldr: OpenThoughts-Agent addresses the understudied problem of training data curation for broadly capable agentic language models. Unlike prior work (SWE-Smith, SERA) that targets single benchmarks, this work develops data recipes that transfer across multiple domains and task types, publicly releasing the methodology to accelerate open-source agentic model development.
alphaxiv_papers.tldr_zh: OpenThoughts-Agent 攻克了通用智能体语言模型训练数据策划这一研究不足的难题。与之前针对单一基准（SWE-Smith、SERA 等）的工作不同，本工作开发了可跨多个领域和任务类型迁移的数据食谱，并公开发布方法以加速开源智能体模型的发展。

github_repos.name: benchflow-ai/awesome-evals
github_repos.tldr: A curated, no-fluff index of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents — papers, blogs, talks, tools, and benchmarks. Maintained by BenchFlow, it has quickly become the go-to reference for practitioners navigating the rapidly expanding agent evaluation landscape.
github_repos.tldr_zh: 由 BenchFlow 维护的 AI 智能体构建与评测资源精选集，收录论文、博客、讲座、工具和基准，去掉一切废话。已成为从业者导航快速膨胀的智能体评测领域的首选索引。

github_repos.name: lemma-work/lemma-platform
github_repos.tldr: Lemma Platform is an open-source workspace designed for human-AI collaborative work, positioning AI agents as equal team members rather than tools. It builds around the concept of shared task spaces where humans and agents coordinate on complex workflows with explicit handoffs and shared context.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Lemma Platform 是面向人机协作的开源工作空间，将 AI 智能体定位为平等团队成员而非工具。围绕共享任务空间构建，让人类和智能体在复杂工作流中通过明确交接和共享上下文协同工作。

github_repos.name: FishCodeTech/muteki
github_repos.tldr: Project Muteki (無敵) is an autonomous multi-model CTF-solving agent swarm that coordinates specialized agents for different challenge categories (reversing, pwn, crypto, web). Each sub-agent runs a different LLM best suited for its domain, with an orchestrator managing the overall attack strategy — treating security competitions as a multi-agent coordination problem.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Project Muteki（无敌）是一个自主多模型 CTF 解题智能体群，针对不同题目类别（逆向、PWN、密码、Web）协调专门智能体。每个子智能体运行最适合其领域的 LLM，由编排器管理整体攻击策略，将安全竞赛作为多智能体协调问题来处理。

github_repos.name: ardhaecosystem/synapse
github_repos.tldr: Synapse provides temporal knowledge graph memory for AI agents using self-hosted FalkorDB and Graphiti with a hippocampus-inspired memory management layer. It models how the hippocampus consolidates short-term experiences into long-term structured knowledge, giving agents a biologically-motivated persistent memory that tracks relationships and temporal context across sessions.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Synapse 为 AI 智能体提供基于自托管 FalkorDB 和 Graphiti 的时序知识图谱记忆，加入仿海马体记忆管理层。模仿海马体将短期经验整合为长期结构化知识的方式，赋予智能体具有生物学依据的持久记忆，可跨会话追踪关系和时序上下文。

github_repos.name: GenseeAI/gensee-crate
github_repos.tldr: Gensee Crate provides runtime safety enforcement for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex) on macOS with real-time system-event monitoring, long-horizon provenance tracking, and policy enforcement. Built in Rust for performance, it gives operators visibility into what coding agents are actually doing on the host system — addressing a critical security gap as agent autonomy increases.
github_repos.tldr_zh: Gensee Crate 为 macOS 上的 AI 编码智能体（Claude Code、Codex）提供运行时安全执行，具备实时系统事件监控、长周期溯源追踪和策略执行功能。用 Rust 构建以保证性能，让运营者能看清编码智能体在宿主系统上的实际行为——随着智能体自主性增强，这一安全关键空白亟需填补。

hackernews.title: Show HN: OpenKnowledge – open source AI-first alternative to Obsidian/Notion
hackernews.tldr: OpenKnowledge is an open-source, AI-native knowledge management tool positioned as a replacement for Obsidian/Notion. It's built from the ground up with AI as the primary interface rather than adding AI as a layer on top of existing document workflows — generating massive HN engagement as users debate whether AI-first PKM can displace established tools.
hackernews.tldr_zh: OpenKnowledge 是开源 AI 原生知识管理工具，定位为 Obsidian/Notion 的替代品。它从零以 AI 作为主界面构建，而非在现有文档工作流上叠加 AI，在 HN 上引发大量讨论——用户热烈争论 AI 优先的 PKM 能否替代成熟工具。

hackernews.title: GLM-5.2 is a step change for open agents
hackernews.tldr: This analysis argues GLM-5.2 represents a qualitative leap for open-source agent capabilities, not just a benchmark score improvement. The piece examines why agentic tasks specifically benefit from GLM-5.2's architecture choices and positions it as the first open model that makes open-source agents genuinely competitive with proprietary systems — triggering heated open-vs-closed debate in 223 HN comments.
hackernews.tldr_zh: 这篇分析文章认为 GLM-5.2 在开源智能体能力上实现了质的飞跃，而非仅仅提升了基准分数。文章剖析 GLM-5.2 的架构选择为何特别适合智能体任务，将其定位为首个让开源智能体真正与专有系统竞争的模型——在 223 条 HN 评论中引发了激烈的开源对闭源之辩。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
hackernews.tldr: Workweave Router injects intelligent model routing directly into Claude, Codex, and Cursor workflows, automatically routing different parts of a task to the most appropriate model based on complexity, cost, and speed requirements. It addresses a real production pain point as developers increasingly juggle multiple AI providers and models within single workflows.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Workweave Router 直接向 Claude、Codex 和 Cursor 工作流注入智能模型路由，根据复杂度、成本和速度需求自动将任务的不同部分路由到最合适的模型。解决了开发者在单一工作流中管理多个 AI 提供商和模型的实际痛点。

hackernews.title: Show HN: Adrafinil – keep a lid-closed Mac awake only while agents work
hackernews.tldr: Adrafinil is a lightweight macOS utility that keeps a laptop awake only while AI agent tasks are actively running, then allows normal sleep when agents finish. It solves the practical annoyance of agents failing because the laptop sleeps mid-task without requiring permanent caffeinate — a small tool with immediate, obvious utility for anyone running local agents.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Adrafinil 是轻量 macOS 工具，仅在 AI 智能体任务运行时保持笔记本唤醒，任务完成后允许正常睡眠。无需永久禁用睡眠，解决了笔记本在任务执行中途进入休眠导致智能体失败的实际烦恼——对所有运行本地智能体的用户都有立竿见影的价值。

hackernews.title: Show HN: peerd – AI agent harness that runs entirely in your browser
hackernews.tldr: Peerd is an AI agent test harness that runs entirely in the browser with no server required, enabling privacy-preserving, local agent execution with full inspection capabilities. It provides a zero-setup environment for testing agent behaviors, tool calls, and multi-step workflows directly in the browser — making agent experimentation accessible without cloud infrastructure.
hackernews.tldr_zh: Peerd 是完全在浏览器中运行的 AI 智能体测试环境，无需服务器，支持保护隐私的本地智能体执行和完整的行为检查能力。提供零配置环境，可直接在浏览器中测试智能体行为、工具调用和多步工作流，让智能体实验无需云基础设施即可上手。
